{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":"2026-04-09T04:02:56.011Z","tool_name":"write_file","tool_id":"write_file_1775707376011_0","parameters":{"content":"import os
import re

path = 'crates/vorce-bevy/src/systems.rs'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

# 1. Triggers
content = content.replace('bevy::prelude::On<bevy::ecs::lifecycle::Add, AudioReactive>', 'Trigger<OnAdd, AudioReactive>')
content = content.replace('bevy::prelude::On<bevy::ecs::lifecycle::Insert, AudioReactive>', 'Trigger<OnInsert, AudioReactive>')
content = content.replace('trigger.entity', 'trigger.entity()')

# 2. Atmosphere
content = re.sub(r'mut scattering_media: ResMut<Assets<bevy_light::atmosphere::ScatteringMedium>>,?', '', content)
content = re.sub(r'\.insert\(bevy_light::Atmosphere::earth\([^)]+\)\)', '', content)

# 3. Camera
old_camera = '''        .spawn((
            Camera3d::default(),
            Camera {
                output_mode: bevy_camera::CameraOutputMode::Write {
                    blend_state: None,
                    clear_color: bevy_camera::ClearColorConfig::Default,
                },
                ..default()
            },
            bevy_camera::CameraMainTextureUsages::default(),
            bevy_camera::RenderTarget::from(image_handle),
            Transform::from_xyz(-2.0, 2.5, 5.0).looking_at(Vec3::ZERO, Vec3::Y),
        ))'''
new_camera = '''        .spawn((
            Camera3d::default(),
            Camera {
                clear_color: bevy::core_pipeline::clear_color::ClearColorConfig::Default,
                target: bevy::render::camera::RenderTarget::Image(image_handle),
                ..default()
            },
            Transform::from_xyz(-2.0, 2.5, 5.0).looking_at(Vec3::ZERO, Vec3::Y),
        ))'''
content = content.replace(old_camera, new_camera)

# 4. PointLight shadows
content = content.replace('shadow_maps_enabled: true', 'shadows_enabled: true')

# 5. hexx::Vec2
content = content.replace('hexx::Vec2::splat(hex_config.radius)', 'Vec2::splat(hex_config.radius)')

# 6. despawn_children -> despawn_descendants
content = content.replace('despawn_children()', 'despawn_descendants()')

# 7. RenderSet::Render
content = content.replace('RenderSet::Render', 'bevy::render::RenderSet::Render')

# 8. gpu_image.texture_descriptor.size
content = content.replace('gpu_image.texture_descriptor.size.width', 'gpu_image.size.x')
content = content.replace('gpu_image.texture_descriptor.size.height', 'gpu_image.size.y')
content = content.replace('gpu_image.texture_descriptor.format', 'gpu_image.texture_format')

# 9. TexelCopy
content = content.replace('bevy::render::render_resource::TexelCopyTextureInfo', 'wgpu::TexelCopyTextureInfo')
content = content.replace('bevy::render::render_resource::TexelCopyBufferInfo', 'wgpu::TexelCopyBufferInfo')
content = content.replace('bevy::render::render_resource::TexelCopyBufferLayout', 'wgpu::TexelCopyBufferLayout')

# 10. Render device poll
old_poll = '''        render_device
            .poll(wgpu::PollType::Wait {
                submission_index: Some(submission_index),
                timeout: None,
            })
            .unwrap();'''
new_poll = '''        let _ = render_device.poll(wgpu::Maintain::Wait);'''
content = content.replace(old_poll, new_poll)

# 11. to_vec().into()
content = content.replace('*lock = Some(data.to_vec());', '*lock = Some(std::sync::Arc::new(data.to_vec()));')
content = content.replace('*lock = Some(unpadded);', '*lock = Some(std::sync::Arc::new(unpadded));')

# 12. JustifyText and FontSize
content = content.replace('Justify::Left', 'bevy::text::JustifyText::Left')
content = content.replace('Justify::Center', 'bevy::text::JustifyText::Center')
content = content.replace('Justify::Right', 'bevy::text::JustifyText::Right')
content = content.replace('Justify::Justified', 'bevy::text::JustifyText::Justified')
content = content.replace('bevy::prelude::FontSize::Px(config.font_size)', 'config.font_size')


with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(content)
print("Applied fixes to vorce-bevy/src/systems.rs")
","file_path":"fix_bevy.py"}}
